position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Proc damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Proc damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/56px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="56" height="56" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span><br><a href="/en-us/Damage">Proc damage</a></span></div></div><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Sub-type(s)</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Physical damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Physical_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage" src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage.svg?4c659" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="56" height="56" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span><br><a href="/en-us/Physical_damage">Physical</a></span></div></div></div><div class="infobox-header">Counters</div><div class="infobox-section-cell"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Spell shield</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span title="This ability will not be blocked by spell shields. • Edge of Night • Banshee's Veil • Nocturne's Shroud of Darkness • Sivir's Spell Shield"><span class="mw-default-size" typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Spell_Shield_Grey.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="64" height="64" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>Not Blocked</span></div></div><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Parries</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span title="This ability will be blocked by effects that mitigate basic attacks. Blind does not affect abilities that trigger on-hit effects, unless otherwise stated. • Nilah's Jubilant Veil • Jax's Counter Strike • Shen's Spirit's Refuge • Teemo's Blinding Dart"><span class="mw-default-size" typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="64" height="64" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>Blocked</span></div></div></div></div>
<dl><dt>General</dt></dl>
<ul><li>The empowered attacks can be parried and will not trigger the area of effect if either the target <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Block"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Block" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/20px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/40px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">blocks</a></span> or <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dodge"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dodge" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/20px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/40px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">dodges</a></span> the attack, or if the attacks miss while <b>Skarner</b> is <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blind"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blind"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blind" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/20px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/40px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blind" class="mw-redirect">blinded</a></span>.
<ul><li>The attacks will be still consumed in all cases regardless.</li>
<li>Note that if the main target is not blocking or dodging, then the area of effect can still deal damage to those who do.</li></ul></li>
<li>The empowered attacks have an <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Uncancellable windup"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack#Uncancellable_Windup"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Uncancellable windup" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Vi_Relentless_Force_2.png/20px-Vi_Relentless_Force_2.png?9f7e9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Vi_Relentless_Force_2.png/40px-Vi_Relentless_Force_2.png?9f7e9 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack#Uncancellable_Windup">uncancellable windup</a></span> against champions, minions, and turrets only.
<ul><li><span style="color:#D53D3D;font-weight:bold;">Editor's Note:</span> Prior to <a href="/en-us/V14.9" title="V14.9">Patch 14.9</a>, the windup was uncancellable regardless of the target's type. It is currently unknown if the change was intentional or not, but seems to be partially intentional based on observation.</li>
<li>Empowered attacks against other units can be <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Interrupted"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Disruption"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Interrupt" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/20px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/40px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Disruption">interrupted</a></span> by crowd control or casting <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Skarner" data-ability="Ixtal's Impact" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Skarner#Ixtal's_Impact"><img alt="An icon for Skarner's ability Ixtal's Impact" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_Ixtal%27s_Impact.png/20px-Skarner_Ixtal%27s_Impact.png?ef09b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_Ixtal%27s_Impact.png/40px-Skarner_Ixtal%27s_Impact.png?ef09b 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Ixtal's_Impact">Ixtal's Impact</a></span></span>, but not by issuing <a href="/en-us/Controls_and_Hotkeys#Player_Movement" title="Controls and Hotkeys">movement commands</a>.</li></ul></li>
<li>The aforementioned unit types, as well as monsters, inhibitors, and the nexus are considered "valid" for <i>Shattered Earth</i> and will only trigger its effects when the main target was one of those. This includes:
<ul><li>Triggering the damaging area of effect,</li>
<li>Refreshing the duration when an empowered attack has begun,</li>
<li>and consume empowered attacks only when they landed. (This way the attacks are not consumed when the target died beforehand.)</li></ul></li>
<li>Attacking any other units will cause <b>Skarner</b> to use his normal basic attacks instead while <i>Shattered Earth</i> is expiring (but still benefit from the increased attack speed and range).</li>
<li>To be more precise about <i>Ixtal's Impact's</i> duration pause, it adds 0.<small>25</small> seconds to the duration every 0.<small>25</small> seconds, but will set it to an estimated minimum of 1.<small>5</small> seconds if it would have been lower.</li>
<li>The <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Slow"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Slow"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Slow" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/20px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/40px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Slow" class="mw-redirect">slow</a></span> applied by <i>Shattered Earth</i> is a generic slow debuff.</li>
<li><i>Shattered Earth</i> is special cased to generate a stack of <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Spear of Shojin" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Spear_of_Shojin"><img alt="An icon for the item Spear of Shojin" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Spear_of_Shojin_item.png/20px-Spear_of_Shojin_item.png?a8a8f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Spear_of_Shojin_item.png/40px-Spear_of_Shojin_item.png?a8a8f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Spear_of_Shojin">Spear of Shojin's</a></span></span> <a href="/en-us/Named_item_effect#Focused_Will" title="Named item effect">Focused Will</a>.</li>
<li>Only the third hit of <i>Shattered Earth</i> triggers <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Tear of the Goddess" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tear_of_the_Goddess"><img alt="An icon for the item Tear of the Goddess" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tear_of_the_Goddess_item.png/20px-Tear_of_the_Goddess_item.png?21811" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tear_of_the_Goddess_item.png/40px-Tear_of_the_Goddess_item.png?21811 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Tear_of_the_Goddess">Tear of the Goddess</a></span></span> and <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Archangel's Staff" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Archangel%27s_Staff"><img alt="An icon for the item Archangel's Staff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Archangel%27s_Staff_item.png/20px-Archangel%27s_Staff_item.png?df623" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Archangel%27s_Staff_item.png/40px-Archangel%27s_Staff_item.png?df623 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Archangel%27s_Staff">Archangel's Staff's</a></span></span> <a href="/en-us/Named_item_effect#manaflow" title="Named item effect">manaflow</a>.</li></ul>
<dl><dt>Interactions & Other</dt></dl>
<ul><li>The attack reset will not save time if <b>Skarner</b> possesses sufficiently high attack speed because of the ability's 0.<small>35</small> seconds cast time. Starting from around <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_speed" title="Attack speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Attack_speed_icon.png/15px-Attack_speed_icon.png?50a17" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Attack_speed_icon.png/30px-Attack_speed_icon.png?50a17 2x" data-file-width="56" data-file-height="56"></a></span> <span style="color: #F5EE99; white-space:normal">271.4285% <b>bonus</b> attack speed</span></span>, basic attacking is fast enough to match the time with the reset and will be even faster with more, causing <i>Shattered Earth</i> to actually slow down the user at that point.
<ul><li>However, this only takes attack speed into account and ignores various other factors, such as the damage and other bonuses from the ability and the fact that <b>Skarner</b> generally does not like building such high amounts of attack speed. Additionally, attempting to do the attack reset at such high attack speed is already a hard task, if not requires frame perfect execution to save any <a href="/en-us/Tick_and_updates" title="Tick and updates">ticks</a> worth of time.</li></ul></li></ul>
<dl><dt>Known issues</dt></dl>
<ul><li><b>Skarner's</b> attack speed is not immediately updated upon casting <i>Shattered Earth</i>. Beginning the first attack shortly after casting results in an attack that does not benefit from the attack speed granted by the ability.</li>
<li>If <i>Upheaval</i> hits an enemy while a new instance of <i>Shattered Earth</i> is active, <i>Shattered Earth's</i> effects are immediately lost.</li>
<li>While <i>Shattered Earth</i> is active, it will not benefit from cooldown refund effects such as <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Transcendence" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Transcendence"><img alt="An icon representing Transcendence" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Transcendence_rune.png/20px-Transcendence_rune.png?e4ae7" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Transcendence_rune.png/40px-Transcendence_rune.png?e4ae7 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Transcendence">Transcendence</a></span></span> or <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Navori Flickerblade" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Navori_Flickerblade"><img alt="An icon for the item Navori Flickerblade" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Navori_Flickerblade_item.png/20px-Navori_Flickerblade_item.png?35cbf" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Navori_Flickerblade_item.png/40px-Navori_Flickerblade_item.png?35cbf 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Navori_Flickerblade">Navori Flickerblade's</a></span></span> <a href="/en-us/Named_item_effect#Transcendence" title="Named item effect">Transcendence</a>.
<ul><li><span style="color:#D53D3D;font-weight:bold;">Editor's Note:</span> This is not a <b>Skarner</b>-specific issue. <li>The empowered attacks lack spell effects as they deal <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Proc damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Proc damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/20px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/40px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">proc damage</a></span>, which does not match with how empowered attacks supposed to behave in general.
<ul><li><span style="color:#D53D3D;font-weight:bold;">Editor's Note:</span> This is possibly a band-aid fix to avoid an issue where <i>Shattered Earth</i> would trigger various effects twice per attack instead of once, as it could be seen during the first PBE deploy of the rework's release, after which the ability was changed from spell damage to proc.</li></ul></li>
<li>The buff used for <i>Shattered Earth</i> is fuzzy. Each attack removes 1 stack on a delay of up to 0.<small>25</small> seconds. This has no known side effects currently.</li>
<li>The slow is also applied and removed in a fuzzy manner, meaning that sometimes it may last shorter or longer than intended, depending on the ticks.</li></ul>

See the notes for more details. • Edge of Night • Banshee's Veil • Nocturne's Shroud of Darkness • Sivir's Spell Shield"><span class="mw-default-size" typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Spell_Shield_Partly.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="64" height="64" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>See Notes</span></div></div><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Projectile</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span title="This ability will be intercepted by Yasuo's Wind Wall, Braum's Unbreakable, Samira's Blade Whirl, and Mel's Rebuttal."><span class="mw-default-size" typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="64" height="64" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>Blocked</span></div></div></div></div>
<dl><dt>General</dt></dl>
<ul><li>While <i>Upheaval</i> can deal damage to structures, the missile can't directly hit them. They have to be within the radius of the explosion.</li>
<li><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell shield"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Spell_shield"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Spell shield" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/20px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/40px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Spell_shield">Spell shield</a></span> will not prevent the explosion from occurring.</li>
<li>This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the end of the cast time.
<ul><li>The direction of cast will be updated to go toward the cast location.</li></ul></li>
<li>The <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Slow"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Slow"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Slow" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/20px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/40px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Slow" class="mw-redirect">slow</a></span> applied by <i>Shattered Earth</i> is a generic slow debuff.</li></ul>
<dl><dt>Known Issues</dt></dl>
<ul><li>If <i>Upheaval</i> hits an enemy while a new instance of <i>Shattered Earth</i> is active, <i>Shattered Earth's</i> effects are immediately lost.<sup><span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">(bug)</span></sup></li></ul>
<div style="clear:both"></div>
</div><p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
			</div>
			<div class="tabbertab" data-title="Tips & Tricks " data-hash="Tips_&_Tricks_" style="display: none;">
				<p class="mw-empty-elt"> 
</p><div style="padding:0.5em 1em;">
<ul><li>Rather than asking if using the final attack or the throw is worth more, instead think and decide about <b>when</b> to use the throw.</li>
<li>When attempting to engage in from safety with <i>Ixtal's Impact</i>, you should consider pre-emptively casting <i>Shattered Earth</i> in most situations. Trying to do it after the engage leaves you more vulnerable as you have to wait for the cast time <b>WHILE</b> in champion combat.</li>
<li>Similarly, learning when and how to use <i>Shattered Earth</i> is the most vital part when you begin to play Skarner. It makes the gameplay experience very punishing when used neglectfully.</li>
<li>As already mentioned in <i>Impale's</i> description, casting <i>Impale</i> while <i>Shattered Earth</i> is active will immediately forces <i>Upheaval</i> to be cast with no cast time. This can be utilised for more efficient damage dealt when optimised or even gaining surprise takedowns against fleeing enemies. <div style="clear:both"></div></li></ul></div><p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
			</div>
			<div class="tabbertab" data-title="Map-Specific Differences " data-hash="Map-Specific_Differences_" style="display: none;">
				<p class="mw-empty-elt"> 
</p><div style="padding:0.5em 1em;">
<p> 
<span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Skarner" data-ability="Shattered Earth" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Skarner#Shattered_Earth"><img alt="An icon for Skarner's ability Shattered Earth" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_Shattered_Earth.png/20px-Skarner_Shattered_Earth.png?e8c33" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_Shattered_Earth.png/40px-Skarner_Shattered_Earth.png?e8c33 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Shattered_Earth">Shattered Earth</a></span></span> 
</p>
<dl><dt><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Arena"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Arena"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Arena" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Arena_icon.png/20px-Arena_icon.png?c4c60" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Arena_icon.png/40px-Arena_icon.png?c4c60 2x" data-file-width="210" data-file-height="210"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Arena">Arena</a></span> differences <sup><a class="text" href="https://wiki.leagueoflegends.com/en-us/Module:MapChanges/data/ar?action=edit">edit</a></sup></dt></dl>
<ul><li><i>Shattered Earth</i> base damage changed to 20 / 40 / 60 / 80 / 100.</li>
<li><i>Upheaval</i> base damage changed to 20 / 40 / 60 / 80 / 100.</li>
<li>Final attack / Upheaval target health ratio changed to <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">12% of target's <b>maximum</b> health</span>. <div style="clear:both"></div></li></ul></div><div style="display:none;padding:0.5em 1em;"><i>No video available.</i></div><p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
			</div></div></div>
<div class="skill skill_w" style="padding: 1em; margin-top: 1em; box-shadow:black 0 2px 5px 0;color:#c8c4bd; border:#525244 solid 1px; background:#082848 no-repeat right top; overflow:hidden; position:relative; z-index: 100;">

<div class="ability-info-description no-stats"><b>Skarner</b> begins the charge at a <span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">static amount</span> of <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Movement_speed" title="Movement speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/15px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/30px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">150 movement speed</span></span> that increases by <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">100</span> every <span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">0.<small>264</small> seconds</span>, up to <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">950 <b>total</b> movement speed</span> by the end of the duration. If <b>Skarner</b> collides with an enemy <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Champion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/20px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/40px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion">champion</a></span> or large <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Monster"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Monster"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Monster" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Monster_icon.png/20px-Monster_icon.png?e9efe" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Monster_icon.png?e9efe 2x" data-file-width="24" data-file-height="24"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Monster">monster</a></span>, he grabs them with his claws for the time of the remaining charge, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Attach"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attached"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Attached" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png/20px-Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png?a039b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png/40px-Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png?a039b 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attached">attaching</a></span> them to himself, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Suppression"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Suppression" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/20px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/40px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression">suppressing</a></span> them, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="True sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword True sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/20px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/40px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight">revealing</a></span> them, increasing the charge's turn rate to the maximum, and gaining <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">300 <b>bonus</b> movement speed</span>, with a minimum total of <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">650</span> and a maximum total of <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">1150</span>. If a target has been grabbed before the first 1.<small>75</small> seconds of the charge, the remaining duration is set to 1 second, and set to 0.<small>5</small> seconds otherwise. The charge does not ramp up in speed while a target is grabbed.</div>
<div class="ability-info-stats"></div>
</div><div class="ability-info-row">
<div class="ability-info-icon"></div>
<div class="ability-info-description">If <b>Skarner's</b> attached target collides with terrain, the charge ends, detaching them from him, dealing <span style="color: #FF8C34; white-space:normal">physical damage</span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Stun"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stun"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Stun" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/20px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/40px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stun" class="mw-redirect">stunning</a></span> them for 1.<small>1</small> seconds, and reducing <i>Ixtal's Impact's</i> <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Cooldown" title="Cooldown"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cooldown_icon.png/15px-Cooldown_icon.png?50d14" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Cooldown_icon.png?50d14 2x" data-file-width="20" data-file-height="20"></a></span> cooldown</span> by 35%.</div>
<div class="ability-info-stats"><dl class="skill-tabs made-skill-tabs" style="letter-spacing:0.02rem;"><dt><span class="template_lc"><b>Physical Damage:</b></span></dt><dd>30 / 60 / 90 / 120 / 150 <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">(+ 120% <b>bonus</b> AD)</span> <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">(+ 6% of his <b>maximum</b> health)</span></dd></dl></div>
</div><div class="ability-info-row">
<div class="ability-info-icon"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Skarner_Ixtal%27s_Impact_2.png?0e997" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="64" height="64" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span></div>
<div class="ability-info-description no-stats"><span class="template_sbc"><b>Recast:</b></span> <b>Skarner</b> ends <i>Ixtal's Impact</i>. If a target has been grabbed, he detaches them from himself.</div>
<div class="ability-info-stats"></div>
</div><div class="ability-info-row">
<div class="ability-info-icon"></div>
<div class="ability-info-description no-stats"><i>Ixtal's Impact ends immediately if <b>Skarner</b> becomes <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Immobilize"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immobilizing"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Immobilize" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/20px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/40px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immobilizing">immobilized</a></span> or <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ground"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ground"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ground" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Grounded_icon.png/20px-Grounded_icon.png?1f132" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Grounded_icon.png/40px-Grounded_icon.png?1f132 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ground" class="mw-redirect">grounded</a></span>, or is affected by any form of <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cast-inhibiting crowd control"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Disrupting"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cast-inhibiting crowd control" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/20px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/40px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Disrupting">cast-inhibiting crowd control</a></span>, during the charge. The grabbed target is detached if this occurs. While the target is grabbed, they are attached to <b>Skarner</b> 200 units in front of him.</i></div>
<div class="ability-info-stats"></div>
</div></div><div class="ability-info-flavor"><div class="ability-info-flavorsound" style="padding-top:0.6em;"><span class="inline-audio" data-vol="0.70"><button title="Play">▶️</button></span> <i><span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">"I am calamity!"</span></i></div></div></div></div></div>

<div style="padding:0.5em 1em;"><div class="infobox"><div class="infobox-section-stacked"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Targeting input</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><a href="/en-us/Targeting#Direction" title="Targeting">Direction</a></div></div></div><div class="infobox-header">Damage classification</div><div class="infobox-section-cell"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Type</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Spell damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Annie_Disintegrate.png/56px-Annie_Disintegrate.png?bbde6" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="56" height="56" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Annie_Disintegrate.png?bbde6 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span><br><a href="/en-us/Damage">Spell damage</a></span></div></div><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Sub-type(s)</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Physical damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Physical_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage" src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage.svg?4c659" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="56" height="56" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span><br><a href="/en-us/Physical_damage">Physical</a></span></div></div></div><div class="infobox-header">Counters</div><div class="infobox-section-cell"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Spell shield</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span title="This ability will be blocked by spell shields. • Edge of Night • Banshee's Veil • Nocturne's Shroud of Darkness • Sivir's Spell Shield"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/56px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="56" height="56" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>Blocked</span></div></div><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Grounded</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span title="This ability is disabled while the user is rooted or grounded."><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cassiopeia_Miasma.png/56px-Cassiopeia_Miasma.png?4b29e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="56" height="56" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Cassiopeia_Miasma.png?4b29e 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>Disabled</span></div></div><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Knockdown</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span title="This mobility ability is either not a dash or grants untargetability or immunity to displacement effects during its dash, and thus is not interrupted by displacement or knockdown effects. Note that certain mobility spells are special cased to be interrupted by immobilizing effects, including airborne."><span class="mw-default-size" typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Knockdown_Grey.png?3e499" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="64" height="64" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>Not Interrupted</span></div></div><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Disruption</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span title="This ability has a channeled effect that will be interrupted by crowd control types that inhibit the casting of abilities and spells: • Airborne • Disrupt • Forced Action (Berserk, Charm, Fear, Flee, Taunt) • Silence and Polymorph • Sleep • Stasis • Stun and Suspension • Suppression. Note that movement channels will also be interrupted by crowd control types that inhibit movement itself, which includes Ground and Root."><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/56px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="56" height="56" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Silence_icon.png?70ec5 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></span></span><br>Interrupted</span></div></div></div></div>
<ul><li>While <i>Ixtal's Impact</i> is active, <b>Skarner's</b> movement speed is set to a static amount that cannot change by any means other than by the ability itself.
<ul><li>Any movement speed modifiers gained before or during the charge are retained however, and will take effect after the charge if the duration permits.</li></ul></li>
<li>The <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal"><b>bonus</b> movement speed</span> from grabbing a target is <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">300</span> only if <b>Skarner's</b> movement speed was between <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">350</span> and <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">850</span> at the time.
<ul><li>If <b>Skarner</b> was at less than <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">350 movement speed</span> when he grabbed the target, his total movement speed is instead set to <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">650</span>. If he was at <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">950 movement speed</span>, his total movement speed is set to the cap of <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">1150</span>.</li></ul></li>
<li><b>Skarner</b> gains a slightly larger field of view during <i>Ixtal's Impact's</i> charge.</li>
<li><i>Ixtal's Impact's</i> attachment depends on the application of the <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Suppression"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Suppression" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/20px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/40px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression">suppression</a></span>; if the suppression is not applied, neither is the attachment. Similarly, if the suppression is removed, so is the attachment.
<ul><li>If the target resists the suppression through <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cc-immune"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immunity"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cc-Immune" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cc-immune_icon.png/20px-Cc-immune_icon.png?85815" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Cc-immune_icon.png/40px-Cc-immune_icon.png?85815 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immunity">total crowd control immunity</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Displacement immune"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Displacement immune" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/20px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/40px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity">displacement immunity</a></span>, or a <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell shield"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Spell_shield"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Spell shield" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/20px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/40px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Spell_shield">spell shield</a></span>. <b>Skarner</b> will not attach them to himself, causing the charge to end instantly.</li>
<li>If the target removes the suppression by any means, including with an applicable <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cleanse"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cleanse" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/20px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/40px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal">cleanse</a></span> effect or <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dispel"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dispel" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Anivia_Rebirth.png/20px-Anivia_Rebirth.png?e5074" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Anivia_Rebirth.png/40px-Anivia_Rebirth.png?e5074 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff">dispel</a></span>, they will detach themselves from <b>Skarner</b> immediately which forces the charge to end instantly and not apply any damage.</li></ul></li>
<li><b>Skarner</b> can move up to 550 units beyond the outer-edge of the battlefield with the charge.
<ul><li>Once he has surpassed this boundary, <i>Ixtal's Impact</i> ends immediately and <b>Skarner</b> is moved to the nearest valid space.</li></ul></li>
<li><i>Ixtal's Impact</i> can interact with <a href="/en-us/Terrain#Player-Generated" title="Terrain">player-generated terrain</a>.</li>
<li>If <b>Skarner</b> is inside terrain when the effect ends, he will be moved to the nearest valid space.</li>
<li>Enemies cannot see <b>Skarner</b> while he is inside terrain, unless they grant sight into the area of terrain he is inside (such as with <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Ashe" data-ability="Hawkshot" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ashe#Hawkshot"><img alt="An icon for Ashe's ability Hawkshot" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ashe_Hawkshot.png/20px-Ashe_Hawkshot.png?eea42" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ashe_Hawkshot.png/40px-Ashe_Hawkshot.png?eea42 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Ashe#Hawkshot">Hawkshot</a></span></span> or <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Quinn" data-ability="Heightened Senses" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Quinn#Heightened_Senses"><img alt="An icon for Quinn's ability Heightened Senses" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Quinn_Heightened_Senses.png/20px-Quinn_Heightened_Senses.png?957d8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Quinn_Heightened_Senses.png/40px-Quinn_Heightened_Senses.png?957d8 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Quinn#Heightened_Senses">Heightened Senses</a></span></span>) or have <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Unobstructed vision"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#Unobstructed_vision"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Unobstructed vision" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stealth_Ward_icon.png/20px-Stealth_Ward_icon.png?0305b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stealth_Ward_icon.png/40px-Stealth_Ward_icon.png?0305b 2x" data-file-width="80" data-file-height="80"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#Unobstructed_vision">unobstructed vision</a></span>.
<ul><li>However, enemies will be notified when <b>Skarner</b> is inside nearby terrain while within a certain distance of him. An indicator will be visible to the enemy player's perspective to represent this.</li></ul></li>
<li>The following table refers for interactions while <b>Skarner</b> is charging:</li></ul>

<div class="ability-info-description"><span class="template_sbc"><b>Active:</b></span> <b>Skarner</b> winds up his stingers over the cast time, then lashes them forward in an isosceles trapezoid in the target direction, dealing <span style="color: #00B0F0; white-space:normal">magic damage</span> to enemies hit and impaling up to 3 of the closest enemy champions within the area to <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Suppression"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Suppression" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/20px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/40px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression">suppress</a></span> them for 1.<small>5</small> seconds. While suppressed, the targets are <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="True sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword True sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/20px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/40px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight">revealed</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Attach"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attached"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Attached" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png/20px-Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png?a039b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png/40px-Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png?a039b 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attached">attached</a></span> to <b>Skarner</b>. If he successfully impales at least one enemy champion, <b>Skarner</b> gains <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">40% <b>bonus</b> movement speed</span> for the same duration.</div>

<ul><li><i>Impale's</i> attachment depends on the application of the <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Suppression"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Suppression" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/20px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/40px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression">suppression</a></span>; if the suppression is not applied, neither is the attachment. Similarly, if the suppression is removed, so is the attachment.
<ul><li>If a target resists the suppression by being <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cc-immune"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immunity"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cc-Immune" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cc-immune_icon.png/20px-Cc-immune_icon.png?85815" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Cc-immune_icon.png/40px-Cc-immune_icon.png?85815 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immunity">immune to crowd control</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Displacement immune"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Displacement immune" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/20px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/40px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity">displacement immune</a></span>, or having a <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell shield"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Spell_shield"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Spell shield" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/20px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/40px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Spell_shield">spell shield</a></span>, <b>Skarner</b> will not attach them to himself.
<ul><li>If all targets hit resist the suppression, <b>Skarner</b> will fail to attach any of them to himself and thus will not initiate <i>Impale</i>, causing the ability to behave as if no valid impale targets were hit.</li></ul></li>
<li>If a target removes the suppression by any means, including with an applicable <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cleanse"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cleanse" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/20px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/40px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal">cleanse</a></span> effect or <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dispel"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dispel" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Anivia_Rebirth.png/20px-Anivia_Rebirth.png?e5074" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Anivia_Rebirth.png/40px-Anivia_Rebirth.png?e5074 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff">dispel</a></span>, they will detach themselves from <b>Skarner</b> immediately.
<ul><li>If all targets remove the suppression, <i>Impale</i> ends prematurely and is cancelled for <b>Skarner</b>.</li></ul></li></ul></li>
<li>If a target would be inside of terrain at the end of the effect, they are moved to the nearest valid space.</li>
<li>If a target would be on the other side of a wall, they are moved to the same side as <b>Skarner</b>.</li>
<li>During <i>Impale</i>, <b>Skarner</b> always faces in the direction of the nearest attached target.</li>
<li>This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the end of the cast time.</li>
<li>The following table refers for interactions while <b>Skarner</b> is in cast time:</li></ul>

			<div class="tabbertab" data-title="Tips & Tricks " data-hash="Tips_&_Tricks_" style="display: none;">
				<p class="mw-empty-elt"> 
</p><div style="display:none;"><b>Tips & Tricks</b><br></div>
<div style="padding:0.5em 1em;">
<ul><li>Since <b>Skarner</b> forcibly faces toward his <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Suppression"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Suppression" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/20px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/40px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression">suppressed</a></span> target(s), he will constantly refresh the bonus granted by <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Approach Velocity" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Approach_Velocity"><img alt="An icon representing Approach Velocity" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Approach_Velocity_rune.png/20px-Approach_Velocity_rune.png?eef19" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Approach_Velocity_rune.png/40px-Approach_Velocity_rune.png?eef19 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Approach_Velocity">Approach Velocity</a></span></span> while performing <i>Impale</i>, thus allowing him to drag enemies much further.<div style="clear:both"></div></li></ul>
</div><p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
			</div>
			<div class="tabbertab" data-title="Map-Specific Differences " data-hash="Map-Specific_Differences_" style="display: none;">
				<p class="mw-empty-elt"> 
</p><div style="display:none;"><b>Map-Specific Differences</b><br></div>
<div style="padding:0.5em 1em;"> 
<dl><dt><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Arena"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Arena"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Arena" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Arena_icon.png/20px-Arena_icon.png?c4c60" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Arena_icon.png/40px-Arena_icon.png?c4c60 2x" data-file-width="210" data-file-height="210"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Arena">Arena</a></span> differences <sup><a class="text" href="https://wiki.leagueoflegends.com/en-us/Module:MapChanges/data/ar?action=edit">edit</a></sup></dt></dl>
<ul><li>Base damage changed to 250 / 350 / 450.<div style="clear:both"></div></li></ul>

<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Cast Time:</b></span> None, <span class="template_sbc"><b>Collision Radius:</b></span> <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cr"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Centered range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_center.png/20px-Range_center.png?cbed4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_center.png/40px-Range_center.png?cbed4 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span></span> <span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">160</span>.</li></ul></li>

<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Active:</b></span> <b>Skarner</b> winds up his stingers over the cast time, during which he is <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Displacement immune"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Displacement immune" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/20px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/40px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity">displacement immune</a></span>, then lashes them forward in an isosceles trapezoid in the target direction, dealing <span style="color: #00B0F0; white-space:normal">150 / 250 / 350</span> <span style="color: #7A6DFF; white-space:normal">(+ 100% AP)</span> <span style="color: #00B0F0; white-space:normal">magic damage</span> to all enemies hit and impaling up to 3 of the closest enemy champions within the area to <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Suppression"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Suppression" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/20px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/40px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression">suppress</a></span> them for 1.<small>5</small> seconds. While suppressed, the targets are <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="True sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword True sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/20px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/40px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight">revealed</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Attach"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attached"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Attached" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png/20px-Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png?a039b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png/40px-Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png?a039b 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attached">attached</a></span> to <b>Skarner</b> 300 units <span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">in front of him</span>.</li>
<li>If <b>Skarner</b> successfully impales at least one enemy champion, he gains <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">40% <b>bonus</b> movement speed</span> for the same duration.</li>
<li>If Impale is cast during <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Skarner" data-ability="Shattered Earth" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Skarner#Shattered_Earth"><img alt="An icon for Skarner's ability Shattered Earth" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_Shattered_Earth.png/20px-Skarner_Shattered_Earth.png?e8c33" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_Shattered_Earth.png/40px-Skarner_Shattered_Earth.png?e8c33 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Shattered_Earth">Shattered Earth</a></span></span>, <b>Skarner</b> automatically casts <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Skarner" data-ability="Upheaval" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Skarner#Upheaval"><img alt="An icon for Skarner's ability Upheaval" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_Upheaval.png/20px-Skarner_Upheaval.png?64972" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_Upheaval.png/40px-Skarner_Upheaval.png?64972 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Upheaval">Upheaval</a></span></span> over no cast time and in the direction of Impale's cast. Targets are placed 200 units in the same direction at the end of the effect.<i></i></li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Cost:</b></span> 100 mana.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Cooldown:</b></span> 120 / 105 / 90 seconds.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Cast Time:</b></span> 0.<small>75</small> seconds, <span class="template_sbc"><b>Range:</b></span> <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Er"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span></span> <span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">-50 - 625</span>, <span class="template_sbc"><b>Width:</b></span> <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Er"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span></span> <span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">350</span> / <span class="basic-tooltip tooltips-init-complete" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;">200</span>.</li></ul></li></ul></div>
<div class="mw-heading mw-heading2"><h2 id="Trivia">Trivia</h2><span class="mw-editsection"><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">[</span><a href="/en-us/Skarner?section=4&veaction=edit" title="Edit section: Trivia" class="mw-editsection-visualeditor"><span>edit</span></a><span class="mw-editsection-divider"> | </span><a href="/en-us/Skarner?action=edit&section=4" title="Edit section's source code: Trivia"><span>edit source</span></a><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">]</span></span></div>
<dl><dt><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Skarner" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="32"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><span><img alt="An icon representing Skarner" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_OriginalSquare.png/32px-Skarner_OriginalSquare.png?76e44" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="32" height="32" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_OriginalSquare.png/64px-Skarner_OriginalSquare.png?76e44 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></span></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><strong class="selflink">Skarner, the Primordial Sovereign</strong></span></span></dt></dl>
<ul><li>During the cast time, <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Skarner" data-ability="Impale" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Skarner#Impale"><img alt="An icon for Skarner's ability Impale" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_Impale.png/20px-Skarner_Impale.png?2b197" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_Impale.png/40px-Skarner_Impale.png?2b197 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Impale">Impale's</a></span></span> decal displays the <span style="white-space:pre;"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Universe:Ixtal" title="Universe:Ixtal"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ixtal_Crest_icon.png/20px-Ixtal_Crest_icon.png?6e315" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ixtal_Crest_icon.png/40px-Ixtal_Crest_icon.png?6e315 2x" data-file-width="138" data-file-height="143"></a></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Universe:Ixtal" title="Universe:Ixtal">Ixtali</a></span></span> <a href="/en-us/The_Axiomata" class="mw-redirect" title="The Axiomata">Axiomata</a>.</li>
<li>His dance is a reference to <a target="_blank" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" class="external text" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LDU_Txk06tM">Crab Rave</a>. This dance can also be synchronized with other Skarners.
<ul><li>A side-by-side comparison can be seen <a target="_blank" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" class="external text" href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wdPEnr4ZsrA">here</a>.</li></ul></li>
<li>Some animations resemble his pre-rework ones:
<ul><li>He has kept the same pose for his <a href="/en-us/Emoting" title="Emoting">joke emote</a>.</li>
<li>Part of the old dance where he swings his claws in a circle can be shown during the restart segment of his current dance loop.</li>
<li>His previous two 'slash' animations (one for the left claw, and one for the right) used during <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Skarner" data-ability="Crystal Slash" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Skarner#Crystal_Slash"><img alt="An icon for Skarner's ability Crystal Slash" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_Crystal_Slash.png/20px-Skarner_Crystal_Slash.png?817df" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_Crystal_Slash.png/40px-Skarner_Crystal_Slash.png?817df 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Crystal_Slash">Crystal Slash's</a></span></span> cast resemble part of his laugh emote.</li></ul></li></ul>
<dl><dt><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Skarner" data-skin="Original" data-variant="old" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="32"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><span><img alt="An icon representing Skarner" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_OriginalSquare_old.png/32px-Skarner_OriginalSquare_old.png?b45c6" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="32" height="32" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_OriginalSquare_old.png/64px-Skarner_OriginalSquare_old.png?b45c6 2x" data-file-width="120" data-file-height="120"></span></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><strong class="selflink">Skarner, the Crystal Vanguard</strong></span></span></dt></dl>
<ul><li>Skarner was deemed overpowered and obnoxious in <a href="/en-us/Ultra_Rapid_Fire" title="Ultra Rapid Fire">Ultra Rapid Fire</a> (2014 edition) and was ultimately disabled in non-custom games.</li>
<li>Skarner had his game assets reused for several <a href="/en-us/Featured_game_mode" title="Featured game mode">featured game modes</a>!
<ul><li>He was given a retexture and features as a monster called the "Draggy Tail Monster" in <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Invasion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Invasion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Invasion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Legendary_Guardian_profileicon.png/20px-Legendary_Guardian_profileicon.png?2b930" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Legendary_Guardian_profileicon.png/40px-Legendary_Guardian_profileicon.png?2b930 2x" data-file-width="300" data-file-height="300"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Invasion">Invasion</a></span>.
<ul><li>Skarner is the only unit that was retextured for this mode that isn't a <a href="/en-us/Voidborn" class="mw-redirect" title="Voidborn">Voidborn</a>.</li></ul></li>
<li>His animations were reused for the <span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Odyssey:_Extraction#Map_elements" title="An icon representing Odyssey: Extraction#Map elements"><img alt="An icon representing Odyssey: Extraction#Map elements" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Crimson_StingerSquare.png/20px-Crimson_StingerSquare.png?40a80" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Crimson_StingerSquare.png/40px-Crimson_StingerSquare.png?40a80 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Odyssey:_Extraction#Map_elements" title="Odyssey: Extraction">Crimson Stinger</a></span></span> and <span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Odyssey:_Extraction#Map_elements" title="An icon representing Odyssey: Extraction#Map elements"><img alt="An icon representing Odyssey: Extraction#Map elements" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Petal_ClawSquare.png/20px-Petal_ClawSquare.png?f0d2f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Petal_ClawSquare.png/40px-Petal_ClawSquare.png?f0d2f 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Odyssey:_Extraction#Map_elements" title="Odyssey: Extraction">Petal Claw</a></span></span> monsters  in <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Odyssey: extraction"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Odyssey:_Extraction"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Odyssey: extraction" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Odyssey_Veteran_profileicon.png/20px-Odyssey_Veteran_profileicon.png?7261f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Odyssey_Veteran_profileicon.png/40px-Odyssey_Veteran_profileicon.png?7261f 2x" data-file-width="300" data-file-height="300"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Odyssey:_Extraction">Odyssey: Extraction</a></span>.</li></ul></li></ul>
