</div><div class="hidden-metadata navigation-not-searchable"><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Attack windup</span></div>
The <b>attack windup</b> is a portion of the <span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/File:Basic_Attack.png" class="mw-file-description"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/20px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/40px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attack</a> animation that must play out in order to launch it. For <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectile"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile">projectile</a></span> basic attacks, the windup usually aligns with drawing the projectile on-screen.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The attack windup is displayed as a percentage, and any windup modifier is listed as a decimal next to it.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Attack speed ratio</span></div>
<p>The <b>Attack speed ratio (AS ratio)</b> adjusts the effectiveness of bonus AS from all sources. It is usually equal to the unit's base AS (level 1 with no bonuses), but tuning to a higher or lower relative value translates to more or less bonus AS received compared to other units with the same base AS. 
</p>
<center><big>Total AS = Base AS + Bonus AS × <span style="color: #D929D9; white-space:normal"><b>AS Ratio</b></span></big><br><i>(All values in decimal form)</i></center><hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The ingame stats HUD displays the <b>AS ratio</b> instead of base AS to communicate this comparative effectiveness. The Wiki opts to always list both stats and show the <b>AS ratio</b> as "N/A" if the two are equal.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gameplay_radius.png/44px-Gameplay_radius.png?ee4af" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Gameplay_radius.png?ee4af 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Gameplay radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>gameplay radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that most closely resembles the concept of a 'hitbox', and is the radius used for <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Edge range"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Range">edge range</a></span> effects, which include <a href="/en-us/Basic_attacks" class="mw-redirect" title="Basic attacks">basic attacks</a>, <a href="/en-us/Direction-targeted" class="mw-redirect" title="Direction-targeted">line collision missiles</a>, rectangular AOEs, and others. The gameplay radius determines the reach of both incoming and outgoing effects: for example, enemies are within a unit's <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> basic attack range</span> based on the edge of their gameplay radius and vice versa.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Selection_radius.png/44px-Selection_radius.png?7345c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Selection_radius.png?7345c 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Selection radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>selection radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the horizontally furthest point from the center of their model that other players' cursor is allowed to be, while still maintaining the ability to select that unit.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Pathing_radius.png/44px-Pathing_radius.png?ee4af" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Pathing_radius.png?ee4af 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Pathing radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>pathing radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the gameplay area they occupy for unit-collision and pathfinding logic. A unit's center cannot intersect with another unit's <b>pathing radius</b>, unless one of them is <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ghosted"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Unit_collision"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ghosted" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ghost.png/20px-Ghost.png?ee615" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ghost.png/40px-Ghost.png?ee615 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Unit_collision">ghosted</a></span>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Selection_height.png/44px-Selection_height.png?8e760" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="43" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Selection_height.png?8e760 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="71"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Selection height</span></div>
A unit's <b>selection height</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the vertically furthest point from the center of their model at the ground that other players' cursor is allowed to be, while still maintaining the ability to select that unit.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Gameplay in <a href="/en-us/League_of_Legends" title="League of Legends">League of Legends</a> takes place in two dimensions no matter the visuals. However, a virtual <i>height</i> dimension that is perpendicular to the ground creates the game's three-dimensional view, which in combination with the camera's perspective necessitates the usage of the <b>selection height</b>.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Acquisition_range.png/44px-Acquisition_range.png?72c63" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Acquisition_range.png?72c63 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Acquisition radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>acquisition range</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the distance at which they will acquire <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack">basic attack</a></span> targets when a target unit is not specified by the player.
</p>
<ul><li>Auto-attacking <i>automatically</i> orders an idle champion to acquire enemies within this range. This can be disabled in the <a href="/en-us/Settings" title="Settings">Settings</a>.</li>
<li>Attack-move commands scan for targets within this range while moving toward a given location.</li></ul>
<p><b>Acquisition range</b> is calculated from the champion's <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Er"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span></span> edge to the edge of other units.<br>
<span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:inherit; white-space:normal">Attack range</span></span> bonuses modify the champion's <b>acquisition range</b> by the same amount.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jungle_icon.png/44px-Jungle_icon.png?9225d" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jungle_icon.png/88px-Jungle_icon.png?9225d 2x" data-file-width="136" data-file-height="136"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Jungle</span></div>
<p>Within a <a href="/en-us/Drafted_team" class="mw-redirect" title="Drafted team">drafted team</a>, the <i>Jungler</i> is the champion assigned to the jungle. A <i>Jungler</i> needs to be able to <a href="/en-us/Jungling" title="Jungling">clear jungle camps</a> without too much difficulty and ambush other champions in lane.
</p>
<p>

position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Assassin"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Assassin"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Assassin" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slayer_icon.png/20px-Slayer_icon.png?dde86" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Slayer_icon.png/40px-Slayer_icon.png?dde86 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Assassin" class="mw-redirect">Assassins</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tank_icon.png/44px-Tank_icon.png?d2561" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tank_icon.png/88px-Tank_icon.png?d2561 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Vanguard</span></div>
<i>Tanks</i> excel in shrugging off incoming damage and focus on disrupting their enemies more than being significant damage threats themselves.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<i>Vanguards</i> are offensive tanks. Vanguards lead the charge for their team and specialize at bringing the action. Their explosive team fight initiation seeks to catch enemies out of position while allowing allies to follow-up to devastating effect.</p>
<p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p><dl><dt>Examples</dt></dl>
<ul><li><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Amumu" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Amumu"><img alt="An icon representing Amumu" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Amumu_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Amumu_OriginalSquare.png?3fa85" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Amumu_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Amumu_OriginalSquare.png?3fa85 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Amumu">Amumu</a></span></span></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Leona" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Leona"><img alt="An icon representing Leona" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Leona_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Leona_OriginalSquare.png?9c355" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Leona_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Leona_OriginalSquare.png?9c355 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Leona">Leona</a></span></span></li>

font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/44px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/88px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Juggernaut</span></div>
<i>Fighters</i> are durable and damage-focused melee champions that look to be in the thick of combat.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<i>Juggernauts</i> are melee titans who relentlessly march down the opposition and devastate those foolish enough to get within their grasp. They are the only subclass who excel at both dealing and taking significant amounts of damage, but in turn they have a tough time closing in on targets due to their low range and extremely limited mobility.</p>
<p class="mw-empty-elt">

margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tank_icon.png/44px-Tank_icon.png?d2561" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tank_icon.png/88px-Tank_icon.png?d2561 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Tank (Legacy)</span></div>
<b>Tanks</b> excel in shrugging off incoming damage and focus on disrupting their enemies more than being significant damage threats themselves.

</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/44px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/88px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Fighter (Legacy)</span></div>
<p><b>Fighters</b> are durable and damage-focused melee champions that look to be in the thick of combat.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Mana_resource.png/44px-Mana_resource.png?5be85" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Mana_resource.png/88px-Mana_resource.png?5be85 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Mana</span></div>
<p><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Mana" title="Mana"><img src="/en-us/images/Mana_icon.svg?d5eaf" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <b>Mana</b></span> (also known as <b>MP</b>) is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that is the resource of many <a href="/en-us/Champion" title="Champion">champions</a> necessary to cast most of their <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a>. Mana can be restored via <a href="/en-us/Mana_regeneration" title="Mana regeneration">mana regeneration</a> and some <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a>, <a href="/en-us/Item" title="Item">items</a>, <a href="/en-us/Rune" title="Rune">runes</a>, and <a href="/en-us/Buff" title="Buff">buffs</a>.<br><br><b>Mana</b> is represented in-game by the blue bar within the HUD, indicating the champion's <b>current</b> mana and <b>maximum</b> mana. <b>Current</b> mana is reduced by expenditure through paying an ability's mana <i>cost</i>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/44px-Melee_role.png?166b1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/88px-Melee_role.png?166b1 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Melee</span></div>
<p><b>Melee</b> champions have a basic attack <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> range</span> usually within 200 units. A melee attack does not use a projectile to deal damage, therefore not subject to effects that mitigate projectiles, like <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Yasuo" data-ability="Wind Wall" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Yasuo#Wind_Wall"><img alt="An icon for Yasuo's ability Wind Wall" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png/20px-Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png?0ffbb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png/40px-Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png?0ffbb 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Yasuo#Wind_Wall">Wind Wall</a></span></span>. Some champions can shift between a ranged and melee form, and certain items/runes differ for melee characters.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/44px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Basic attack</span></div>
The <b>basic attack</b> (or "auto") is the default means by which a unit deals damage, usually equaling <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_damage" title="Attack damage"><img src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage_icon.svg?51c73" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">100% AD</span></span> <span style="color: #FF8C34; white-space:normal">physical damage</span>. <b>Basic attacks</b> are normally unit-targeted <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Edge range"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Range">edge range</a></span> spells, and the <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> attack range</span> stat determines their reach.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The caster must stand still to complete a brief <i>windup</i> before launching a <b>basic attack</b>. Depending on the caster:
</p><ul><li>If a caster's attacks are non-projectile (e.g. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Melee"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Melee"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Melee" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/20px-Melee_role.png?166b1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/40px-Melee_role.png?166b1 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Melee" class="mw-redirect">melee</a></span>) launching the attack deals damage immediately.</li>
<li>If a caster's attacks are <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectile"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile">projectile</a></span>, launching the attack sends a projectile that follows the target and deals damage upon striking them.</li></ul>
The caster then incurs a brief cooldown, based on their <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_speed" title="Attack speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Attack_speed_icon.png/15px-Attack_speed_icon.png?50a17" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Attack_speed_icon.png/30px-Attack_speed_icon.png?50a17 2x" data-file-width="56" data-file-height="56"></a></span> <span style="color: #F5EE99; white-space:normal">attack speed</span></span>. Basic attacks' damage may trigger <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Proc damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Proc damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/20px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/40px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">on-hit effects</a></span> only upon dealing damage. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Attacking"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-attack" src="/en-us/images/On-attack_icon.svg?88ec8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="512" data-file-height="512"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Attacking">On-attack</a></span> effects will always trigger upon the attack's <i>windup</i> completing.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/44px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="37" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/88px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736 2x" data-file-width="173" data-file-height="146"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">On-hit effect</span></div>
<b>On-hit</b> is an umbrella term for a type of effect that triggers on instances of <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/20px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/40px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">basic damage</a></span>, or generally upon a <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack">basic attack</a></span> or certain attack-like <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion_ability"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion ability" src="/en-us/images/Champion_ability.svg?8f232" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability">ability</a></span> hitting a target. Most on-hit effects deal <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Proc damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Proc damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/20px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/40px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">proc damage</a></span> or <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Default damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Default damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png/20px-Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png?da188" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png/40px-Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png?da188 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage">default damage</a></span>, which are non-reactive (= the effects don't trigger more effects).<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p><ul><li><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Critical strikes"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Critical_strike"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Critical strike" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/20px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/40px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f 2x" data-file-width="144" data-file-height="144"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Critical_strike">Critical strikes</a></span> are <b>not</b> on-hit effects. An ability listed as applying on-hit effects cannot critically strike unless otherwise stated.</li>
<li><span style="color: #CC2051; white-space:normal"><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Life_steal" title="Life steal"><img src="/en-us/images/Life_steal_icon.svg?6c8ea" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> Life steal</span></span> is <b>not</b> an on-hit effect. Damage from on-hit effects normally does not apply life steal, unless those effects deal <i>basic damage</i> or are special-cased to benefit from life steal.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></li></ul>

<p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p><hr>The ability counterpart to <b>on-hit effects</b> are <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects">ability effects</a></span>, which apply on instances of <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Karthus_Lay_Waste.png/20px-Karthus_Lay_Waste.png?9badb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Karthus_Lay_Waste.png/40px-Karthus_Lay_Waste.png?9badb 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_damage">ability damage</a></span>.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style="width:500px;box-sizing:content-box;">

While suppressed, the targets are <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="True sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword True sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/20px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/40px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight">revealed</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Attach"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attached"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Attached" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png/20px-Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png?a039b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png/40px-Yuumi_You_and_Me%21.png?a039b 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attached">attached</a></span> to <b>Skarner</b>. If he successfully impales at least one enemy champion, <b>Skarner</b> gains <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Movement_speed" title="Movement speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/15px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/30px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal"><b>bonus</b> movement speed</span></span> for <i>Impale's</i> duration.</td></tr><tr><td style="vertical-align:top; padding: 0.5em; text-align: left;"><b>Skarner</b> will automatically cast <i><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Skarner" data-ability="Upheaval" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Skarner#Upheaval"><img alt="An icon for Skarner's ability Upheaval" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_Upheaval.png/20px-Skarner_Upheaval.png?64972" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Skarner_Upheaval.png/40px-Skarner_Upheaval.png?64972 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Upheaval">Upheaval</a></span></span></i> in the direction of <i>Impale's</i> cast.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Stack_icon.png?2cff8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="36" data-file-height="36"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Stack</span></div>
A <b>stack</b> refers to a <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Buff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Buff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Buff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Promote.png/20px-Promote.png?7b9a4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Promote.png/40px-Promote.png?7b9a4 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Buff">buff</a></span> or <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Debuff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Debuff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/20px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/40px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff">debuff</a></span> that can be increased in count under certain circumstances. Stacking effects with durations will refresh per instance, unless otherwise stated.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Stacking effects that time out may cause all stacks to expire at once or one by one in given intervals, depending on the source.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Monster_icon.png?e9efe" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="24" data-file-height="24"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Monster</span></div>
<p><b>Monsters</b> are neutral units in <b>League of Legends</b>. Unlike <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Minions"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Minion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/20px-Minion_icon.png?b3697" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/40px-Minion_icon.png?b3697 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Minion">minions</a></span>, monsters do not fight for either team, and will only do so if <i>aggroed</i> (provoked) – with the exception of the <span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Rift_Scuttler" title="An icon representing Rift Scuttler"><img alt="An icon representing Rift Scuttler" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png/20px-Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png?c9a70" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png/40px-Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png?c9a70 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Rift_Scuttler" class="mw-redirect" title="Rift Scuttler">Rift Scuttler</a></span></span>, which simply runs away when attacked.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/44px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Proc damage</span></div>
<i>Proc damage</i> is damage type assigned to most <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-hit"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-hit" src="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/20px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="17" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/40px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736 2x" data-file-width="173" data-file-height="146"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting">on-hit</a></span> effects. It is worth noting that many seeming on-hit effects are actually classified as <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Karthus_Lay_Waste.png/20px-Karthus_Lay_Waste.png?9badb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Karthus_Lay_Waste.png/40px-Karthus_Lay_Waste.png?9badb 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_damage">ability damage</a></span> and so will trigger <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects">ability effects</a></span>. Some forms of on-hit damage, such as by <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Blade of the Ruined King" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blade_of_the_Ruined_King"><img alt="An icon for the item Blade of the Ruined King" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blade_of_the_Ruined_King_item.png/20px-Blade_of_the_Ruined_King_item.png?f5f23" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blade_of_the_Ruined_King_item.png/40px-Blade_of_the_Ruined_King_item.png?f5f23 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Blade_of_the_Ruined_King">Blade of the Ruined King</a></span></span> and <span class="inline-image item-icon item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Sheen" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sheen"><img alt="An icon for the item Sheen" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sheen_item.png/20px-Sheen_item.png?2bece" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sheen_item.png/40px-Sheen_item.png?2bece 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span></span> <a href="/en-us/Named_item_effect#Spellblade" title="Named item effect">Spellblade</a>, also benefit from <span style="color: #CC2051; white-space:normal"><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Life_steal" title="Life steal"><img src="/en-us/images/Life_steal_icon.svg?6c8ea" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> life steal</span></span>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<i>Proc damage</i> does not interact with most other effects, such as <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Luden's Echo" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Luden%27s_Echo"><img alt="An icon for the item Luden's Echo" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Luden%27s_Tempest_item.png/20px-Luden%27s_Tempest_item.png?e80fc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Luden%27s_Tempest_item.png/40px-Luden%27s_Tempest_item.png?e80fc 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Luden%27s_Echo">Luden's Echo</a></span></span> or <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Arcane Comet" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Arcane_Comet"><img alt="An icon representing Arcane Comet" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Arcane_Comet_rune.png/20px-Arcane_Comet_rune.png?cffe0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Arcane_Comet_rune.png/40px-Arcane_Comet_rune.png?cffe0 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Arcane_Comet">Arcane Comet</a></span></span>. The main exception is:
</p><ul><li><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Omnivamp"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Vamp#Omnivamp"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Omnivamp" src="/en-us/images/Omnivamp_colored_icon.svg?8811b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Vamp#Omnivamp">Omnivamp</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Physical vamp"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Vamp#Physical_vamp"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Physical vamp" src="/en-us/images/Life_steal_icon.svg?6c8ea" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Vamp#Physical_vamp">Physical vamp</a></span> (where applicable) heal for a percentage of damage dealt.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></li></ul>

<p>
Effects triggered by damage subtypes (<span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Physical damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Physical_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage" src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage.svg?4c659" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Physical_damage">physical</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Magic damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Magic_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Magic damage" src="/en-us/images/Magic_damage.svg?f4db1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Magic_damage">magic</a></span>, <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="True damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/True_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword True damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Hybrid_penetration.png/20px-Hybrid_penetration.png?d6752" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Hybrid_penetration.png/40px-Hybrid_penetration.png?d6752 2x" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/True_damage">true</a></span>) will always occur regardless of damage type (e.g. <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Black Cleaver" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Black_Cleaver"><img alt="An icon for the item Black Cleaver" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Black_Cleaver_item.png/20px-Black_Cleaver_item.png?98eed" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Black_Cleaver_item.png/40px-Black_Cleaver_item.png?98eed 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Black_Cleaver">Black Cleaver's</a></span></span> Carve stacking on instances of <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Physical damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Physical_damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage" src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage.svg?4c659" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Physical_damage">physical damage</a></span> and <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Morellonomicon" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Morellonomicon"><img alt="An icon for the item Morellonomicon" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Morellonomicon_item.png/20px-Morellonomicon_item.png?e9bc2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Morellonomicon_item.png/40px-Morellonomicon_item.png?e9bc2 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Morellonomicon">Morellonomicon's</a></span></span> <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; <b>Dodging</b> an instance of damage will <i>skip</i> its damage event entirely, preventing it from being taken and effects that trigger from damage. <i>Dodge</i> takes precedence over <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Block"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Block" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/20px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/40px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">block</a></span>, but not <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blind"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blind"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blind" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/20px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/40px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blind" class="mw-redirect">blind</a></span>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Effects that <i>dodge</i> damage will only <i>dodge</i> instances that are <i>dodgeable</i>. Note that these are specified in the ability details on the Wiki. 
<br><br>Basic attacks and abilities that apply on-hit effects are always <i>dodged</i>, unless otherwise stated.</p>

<p>A unit that is <i>blinded</i> will <i>miss</i> their <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack">basic attacks</a></span> for the duration, comparable to attacking a target that is able to <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dodge"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dodge" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/20px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/40px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">dodge</a></span> or <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Block"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Block" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/20px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/40px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">block</a></span>, but not mechanically similar. <i>Missed</i> basic attacks will fail to deal damage and apply <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-hit"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-hit" src="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/20px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="17" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/40px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736 2x" data-file-width="173" data-file-height="146"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting">on-hit</a></span> effects, with the exception of some <a href="/en-us/Basic_Attack#Empowered_Basic_Attack" class="mw-redirect" title="Basic Attack">empowered basic attacks</a>. <i>Blind</i> does not prevent the unit from declaring attacks, unlike <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Disarm"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Disarm"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Disarm" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Disarm_icon.png/20px-Disarm_icon.png?41bf4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Disarm_icon.png/40px-Disarm_icon.png?41bf4 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Disarm" class="mw-redirect"><b>Disarm</b></a></span>.
</p>
<hr style="border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 2px 0px;">
<table style="text-align:left; width:100%;">

<tbody><tr>
<th style="vertical-align:top; width:52px;">Interrupts:
</th>
<td>Does not interrupt any actions, but will prevent <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-hit"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-hit" src="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/20px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="17" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/40px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736 2x" data-file-width="173" data-file-height="146"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting">on-hit effects</a></span> from being triggered by basic attacks.
</td></tr>
<tr>
<th style="vertical-align:top;">Reduction:
</th>
<td>The <b>duration</b> is affected by <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Tenacity"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tenacity"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Tenacity" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tenacity_icon.png/20px-Tenacity_icon.png?5ab5f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tenacity_icon.png/40px-Tenacity_icon.png?5ab5f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Tenacity">Tenacity</a></span>.
</td></tr>
<tr>
<th style="vertical-align:top;">Resist:
</th>
<td>Resisted by <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cc-immune"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immunity"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cc-Immune" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cc-immune_icon.png/20px-Cc-immune_icon.png?85815" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Cc-immune_icon.png/40px-Cc-immune_icon.png?85815 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immunity">crowd control immunity</a></span>.
</td></tr>
<tr>
<th style="vertical-align:top;">Removal:
</th>

<b>Blocking</b> an instance of damage will reduce its value to <b>0</b>, but does not prevent effects that trigger from damage. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blind"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blind"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blind" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/20px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/40px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blind" class="mw-redirect">Blind</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dodge"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dodge" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/20px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/40px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying">dodge</a></span> take precedence over <i>block</i>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Effects that <i>block</i> damage will only <i>block</i> instances that are <i>blockable</i>. Note that these are specified in the ability details on the Wiki.
<br><br>Basic attacks and abilities that apply on-hit effects are always <i>blocked</i>, unless otherwise stated.</p>
<p>
<i>This effect is exclusive to <span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Shen" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Shen"><img alt="An icon representing Shen" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Shen_OriginalSquare.png?7795f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Shen_OriginalSquare.png?7795f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Shen">Shen's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Shen" data-ability="Spirit's Refuge" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Shen#Spirit's_Refuge"><img alt="An icon for Shen's ability Spirit's Refuge" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/20px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/40px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Shen#Spirit's_Refuge">Spirit's Refuge</a></span></span></span> and is similar though mechanically different to <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; font-weight: bold;">Spell shield</span></div>
<p>A <b>spell shield</b> refers to one of several effects that have the capacity to negate hostile abilities from applying to the recipient. A <b>spell shield</b> may negate many active effects coming from <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">champion abilities</a>, <a href="/en-us/Monster" title="Monster">epic monsters</a>, <a href="/en-us/Champion_summoned_units" title="Champion summoned units">champion summoned units</a>, and <a href="/en-us/Item_(League_of_Legends)" class="mw-redirect" title="Item (League of Legends)">items</a>, but almost none from <a href="/en-us/Rune" title="Rune">runes</a> and <a href="/en-us/Summoner_spell" title="Summoner spell">summoner spells</a> with the only exceptions of <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Arcane Comet" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Arcane_Comet"><img alt="An icon representing Arcane Comet" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Arcane_Comet_rune.png/40px-Arcane_Comet_rune.png?cffe0 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Unleashed_Smite.png/40px-Unleashed_Smite.png?e4e9b 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span
