</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_center.png/44px-Range_center.png?cbed4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_center.png/88px-Range_center.png?cbed4 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Centered range</span></div>
<p><b>Centered range</b> is calculated from the <b>center</b> of a source unit's hitbox to the <b>center</b> of a target unit's hitbox.
</p>
<ul><li>Centered range is used for most <a href="/en-us/Targeting#Unit-targeted" title="Targeting">unit-targeted</a> abilities.</li>
<li>It is <i>less</i> effective and may seem to have diminished reach against <a href="/en-us/Unit_size" title="Unit size">large</a> units.</li></ul>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/44px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Slow_icon.png?2e57e 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Slow</span></div>
A unit that is <i>slowed</i> has reduced <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Movement_speed" title="Movement speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/15px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/30px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Movement_speed" title="Movement speed">movement speed</a></span> for the duration. <i>Slows</i> based on a percentage value cannot reduce a target below <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Movement_speed" title="Movement speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/15px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/30px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">110 movement speed</span></span>. Some <i>slows</i> will instead modify the target's <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">movement speed</span> to a static value, which may not be further reduced nor increased.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Only the slow with the highest value is taken into movement speed calculations. All additional slows are ignored until the higher-valued slow wears off. The strength of slows may amplify or decay over their duration. Slows of the same debuff cannot stack and will instead refresh on each application unless otherwise stated.</p><hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Negative <i>slow</i> values will increase the unit's <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">movement speed</span> instead.</p>
<hr style="border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 2px 0px;">

</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Structure_icon.png/44px-Structure_icon.png?41191" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Structure_icon.png?41191 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Structure</span></div>
A <b>structure</b> is a fixed, immobile unit on the battlefield that exists to control a team's territory and protect their base. Structures include <b>turrets</b>, <b>inhibitors</b>, and the <b>Nexus</b>. The structure unit type is considered an invalid target to most abilities and spells, and can normally only be damaged with <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attacks"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack">basic attacks</a></span>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<b>Turrets</b> are heavy fortifications that defend a part of territory. They provide vision of the area and autonomously fire homing bolts at nearby enemies, establishing a defensive ground for allies.<br><br><b>Inhibitors</b> are stone platforms containing an arcane crystal. They are located in each team's base and are each protected by an inhibitor turret standing before them in the same lane. When a team's inhibitor is destroyed, allied <span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Super_minion" title="An icon representing Super minion"><img alt="An icon representing Super minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blue_Super_MinionSquare.png/20px-Blue_Super_MinionSquare.png?40fac" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blue_Super_MinionSquare.png/40px-Blue_Super_MinionSquare.png?40fac 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Super_minion" title="Super minion">super minions</a></span></span> will begin spawning in the waves set in the respective lane.<br><br>The <b>Nexus</b> is a massive stone platform containing a large arcane crystal. One is located in each team's base and each are protected by two Nexus turrets standing before them. When a team's Nexus is destroyed, they are defeated and the opposing team scores victory of the match, thus ending the game.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Monster_icon.png?e9efe" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="24" data-file-height="24"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Monster</span></div>
<p><b>Monsters</b> are neutral units in <b>League of Legends</b>. Unlike <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Minions"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Minion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Minion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/20px-Minion_icon.png?b3697" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_icon.png/40px-Minion_icon.png?b3697 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Minion">minions</a></span>, monsters do not fight for either team, and will only do so if <i>aggroed</i> (provoked) – with the exception of the <span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Rift_Scuttler" title="An icon representing Rift Scuttler"><img alt="An icon representing Rift Scuttler" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png/20px-Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png?c9a70" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png/40px-Rift_ScuttlerSquare.png?c9a70 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Rift_Scuttler" class="mw-redirect" title="Rift Scuttler">Rift Scuttler</a></span></span>, which simply runs away when attacked.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Fiora_Bladework.png/44px-Fiora_Bladework.png?1fcc5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Fiora_Bladework.png?1fcc5 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Basic attack reset</span></div>
An <b>attack reset</b> is a mechanic that will result in a champion's attack timer being reset to zero. When this effect takes place during the basic attack's cooldown and not its windup, it allows the attacker to start a second attack quicker than normal.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Certain abilities and item actives can reset the attack timer upon use. <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Hail of Blades" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Hail_of_Blades"><img alt="An icon representing Hail of Blades" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Hail_of_Blades_rune.png/20px-Hail_of_Blades_rune.png?9b79e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Hail_of_Blades_rune.png/40px-Hail_of_Blades_rune.png?9b79e 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Hail_of_Blades">Hail of Blades</a></span></span> generates an additional <a href="/en-us/Stack" title="Stack">stack</a> of its effect each time the user casts an ability or spell that has an <b>attack reset</b>.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style="width:500px;box-sizing:content-box;">

font-weight: bold;">Edge range</span></div>
<p><b>Edge range</b> is calculated from the <b>edge</b> of a source unit's hitbox to the <b>edge</b> of a target unit's hitbox.
</p>
<ul><li>Edge range is mostly used for <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attacks</a>; <a href="/en-us/Targeting#Direction-targeted" title="Targeting">skill shots</a>; and point-blank areas of effect (including <a href="/en-us/Aura" title="Aura">auras</a>).</li>
<li>These become <i>more</i> effective against large champions, as the source gains more reach against them. This may be favorable or unfavorable: durable champions tend to be larger and thus easier to hit, and frail champions tend to be smaller and more difficult to hit.</li></ul>

<p>
Any effect that would disrupt an attack's windup, aside from the ones noted above, are ignored by basic attacks with <b>uncancellable windups</b>. If the attack doesn't lock out other abilities, they may be used normally, and the basic attack will hit during the ability cast.</p>

<p><b>Interrupt</b> is a quality of crowd control that <i>interrupts</i> an in-progress effect, preventing its completion or causing the effect to go off at an <i>interrupted</i> state.

<p><span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Attack windup"><a href="/en-us/Attack_speed#Windup">Basic attack windups</a></span> are <i>interrupted</i> by all forms of crowd control that inhibit attacking. <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ground"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ground"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ground" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Grounded_icon.png/20px-Grounded_icon.png?1f132" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Grounded_icon.png/40px-Grounded_icon.png?1f132 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ground" class="mw-redirect">Ground</a></span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Root"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Root"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Root" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Root_icon.png/20px-Root_icon.png?80b80" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Root_icon.png/40px-Root_icon.png?80b80 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Root" class="mw-redirect">Root</a></span> only <i>interrupt</i> channeled and charged movement abilities.

<td style="text-align:right;">
</td></tr></tbody></table><table style="width:100%;"><tbody><tr><td style="vertical-align:top; padding: 0.5em; text-align: left;"><span class="template_sbc"><b>Active:</b></span> <span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Briar" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Briar"><img alt="An icon representing Briar" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Briar_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Briar_OriginalSquare.png?37f17" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Briar_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Briar_OriginalSquare.png?37f17 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Briar">Briar</a></span></span> empowers her next attack during <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon tooltips-init-complete" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Briar" data-ability="Blood Frenzy" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Briar#Blood_Frenzy"><img alt="An icon for Briar's ability Blood Frenzy" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Briar_Blood_Frenzy.png/20px-Briar_Blood_Frenzy.png?2fadf" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Briar_Blood_Frenzy.png/40px-Briar_Blood_Frenzy.png?2fadf 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Briar#Blood_Frenzy">Blood Frenzy</a></span></span> to take a bite out of the target enemy. The attack gains increased <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> range</span>, deals <span style="color: #FF8C34; white-space:normal"><b>bonus</b> physical damage</span> based on the target's <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal"><b>missing</b> health</span> and <span class="glossary tooltips-init-complete" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Heal"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Healing"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Heal" src="/en-us/images/Heal_power_icon.svg?42353" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Healing">heals</a></span> <b>Briar</b> for a portion of the damage dealt.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
